title: Inflatable pillow
abstract: An inflatable pillow includes a bladder with an internal chamber therein; an electronic box embedded in the bladder; and a check valve assembly embedded in the bladder to provide air to the internal chamber in the bladder. An electric air pump, a PCB and a battery are placed inside the electronic box and electrically connected therebetween. The PCB controls the electric air pump switched on or off. The pillow can be inflated automatically by the electric air pump.
claims:
Claims Claims An inflatable pillow comprising: a bladder with an internal chamber therein; an electronic box embedded in the bladder; and a check valve assembly embedded in the bladder to provide air to the internal chamber in the bladder; wherein an electric air pump, a PCB and a battery are placed inside the electronic box and electrically connected therebetween; the PCB controls the electric air pump switched on or off; and the pump has an air conduit or opening communicating an internal cavity in the pump with the internal chamber in the bladder; and the pillow can be inflated automatically by the electric air pump. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein the PCB is integrated a time-control module; and the time-control module controls the electric air pump to operate for a certain time after being actuated and then automatically being switched off. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein a switch is set on the PCB for switching on and off the electric air pump, and the switch can be operated from a surface of the pillow by a user. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein a USB connector is set on the PCB and forms a port exposed to an outer surface of the pillow for charging the battery from an outer power source. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein a light indicator is set on the PCB and extends to an outer surface of the pillow for indicating a working status of the electric air pump and/or battery charging and/or remaining capacity of the battery. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein the electric air pump forms an air conduit or opening passing through a hole in a side wall of the electrics box; and the air conduit or opening acts as an air inlet and outlet when inflating or deflating the bladder. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein the check valve assembly comprises a valve body embedded in the bladder and defining an opening at its center; and the opening communicates the inner chamber of the bladder with the ambient air. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 7, wherein a sealing cap is captured on a top of the valve body, is capable of sealing the opening when is covered on valve body, and can open the valve body to the 

 ambient air when is removed from the opening. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 7, wherein a flap is set under the opening and is used to block the opening when the pillow is properly inflated for maximum comfort, or when the air bladder is empty and the pillow is being stored or transported. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 9, wherein a push rod is set in the opening; and the flap is attached to a bottom end of the push rod, and can be pushed to leave the opening by the push rod. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 10, wherein the push rod is resiliently and movably fitted in the opening of the valve body. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 11, wherein a spring is set around push rod and resiliently engaged with the push rod; the push rod has a broader top plan thus forming an extensive fringe, and an inner wall of the opening forms a protruding member; the spring is set between the extensive fringe and the protruding member; whereby the spring is compressed when push down the push rod, and the flap attached at the bottom end of the rod is pushed away from the opening for air discharging; and the push rod bearing the flap can restore an original place under the resilient force of the spring. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 8, wherein the sealing cap covers and seals the opening by interference fit between an annular wall of the cap and an inner wall of the opening. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein the bladder defines a gas port for air inlet and outlet, and the check valve assembly comprises a sealing member under the gas port; the sealing member is used to block gas or air in the bladder when the inflatable pillow is inflated, and can be removed to deflate the pillow. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein the bladder is made from elastic materials, and has a U-shape. According to the inflatable pillow in claim 1, wherein the electric air pump, the PCB and the battery are built-in elements in the pillow; and the pillow has a U shape.
